prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "死虫式" (dead bug) exercise, side view, facing right. Person posture: Athletic person mid-rep of a dead bug: lying supine on the floor with the lower back pressed flat into the floor (no arch); right arm fully extended overhead toward the ceiling beyond the head, almost touching the ground; left leg fully extended forward parallel to the floor a few inches above the ground; left arm bent at 90 degrees with hand near the right knee; right knee bent at 90 degrees with thigh perpendicular to the floor (hip and knee both flexed); the diagonal arm-leg pair (right arm + left leg) is fully extended while the opposite pair (left arm + right leg) is held tucked; plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: deep core (transverse abdominis and rectus abdominis) for anti-extension. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: hip flexors of the bent leg and shoulder stabilizers. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "腹横肌" pointing to the transverse abdominis (deep core); "腹直肌" pointing to the rectus abdominis; "髂腰肌 / 肩稳定肌" pointing to the hip flexors and shoulder stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
